creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Graphics Processor: llvmpipe

Maybe Plasma treats llvmpipe as broken GPU configuration[1] thus disables saving to prevent intermittent issues from overwriting the last good config. plasma5-systemsettings source lacks GPU-related code, so it's hard to confirm/disprove my guess.

[1] https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/issues/175
